driver_subject: clk: socfpga: s10: Make use of the helper function devm_platform_ioremap_resource()
stage1_reason: Two of four commits explicitly migrate from platform_get_resource()+devm_ioremap_resource() to devm_platform_ioremap_resource(), which is a kernel API consolidation introduced in v5.3. The other two commits are minor cleanups unrelated to API changes.
stage2_reason: Driver commits explicitly migrate to devm_platform_ioremap_resource(), which was introduced by kernel commit 7945f929f1a7 in v5.3. The driver migration from v5.16 to v5.17 adopts this API consolidation.
